title: hieracium pallidum subsp. mollicrinum
intro: Hieracium pallidum subsp. mollicrinum, also known as the yellow hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and soothing irritated skin. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Hieracium pallidum subsp. mollicrinum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make teas, topical creams, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
